title: Paldean Wonders (B2a) release: Card list, Events, Solo Battles

upcoming_events.name: Pokémon 30th Celebration
upcoming_events.description: February 27: Pokémon 30th Celebration. To celebrate the 30th anniversary of our favorite franchise, a set of missions rewarding exclusive accessories and many booster packs from the B series and the Deluxe Pack: ex expansion are now available on Pokémon TCG Pocket. Log-in for 30 days to collect all these rewards!

upcoming_events.name: Paldean Wonders Emblem Event
upcoming_events.description: February 28: Paldean Wonders Emblem Event. Collect emblems and various rewards by winning PvP matches.

upcoming_events.name: Monthly Premium Shop Update
upcoming_events.description: March 1: Monthly Premium Shop Update. The premium accessories are themed around Sprigatito. The log-in reward for Premium Pass holders is an Art Rare Quaxly.

upcoming_events.name: Bonus Week Missions
upcoming_events.description: March 7: Bonus Week Missions. For a week, several missions will be available. Completing them will reward you with Pack Hourglasses, Shinedust and Shop Tickets.

upcoming_events.name: ranked Match Season 11 (B2a)
upcoming_events.description: March 11: The ranked Match Season 11 (B2a) starts! The eleventh season of ranked will last until March 25.

upcoming_events.name: Charcadet Drop event
upcoming_events.description: March 11: Charcadet Drop event. Get an exclusive Art Rare Charcadet and exclusive Smoliv and Frigibax, as well as alternative artworks for Tinkaton and Tatsugiri in this Solo Battle event.

upcoming_events.name: Pawmi and Paldean Clodsire Wonderpick
upcoming_events.description: March 15: Pawmi and Paldean Clodsire Wonderpick. A Wonder Pick event where you can get Promo Pawmi, Promo Paldean Clodsire and Arven themed accessories in exchange of Event Shop Tickets (Arven).

upcoming_events.name: B2b
upcoming_events.description: The next set B2b will be released on March 26.
